judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with impressive top and bottom-line expansion, but faces significant debt and negative free cash flow.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 34.5%; next earnings date is 2026-08-04.
positives: Revenue growth 122.7% YoY and earnings growth 326.0% YoY show explosive expansion.
Quarterly earnings growth of 344.4% indicates strong recent performance.
Forward P/E of 10.22x is attractive given the high growth rates.
Return on equity at 17.9% and return on assets at 5.5% demonstrate effective use of capital.
negatives: Gross margin at 8.4% and operating margin at 6.1% are relatively thin.
Total debt of $9.15B against $1.31B cash results in significant leverage.
Free cash flow is negative $-7.45B TTM, indicating cash burn.
Debt/Equity ratio of 120.80% highlights substantial financial risk.

news.paragraph: Super Micro Computer (SMCI) is facing some external headwinds, with news of Taiwan seeking to detain individuals in an Nvidia smuggling crackdown, which could indirectly affect supply chains. Meanwhile, Mizuho maintained a neutral rating on the stock, suggesting a balanced view from analysts. The upcoming earnings report on August 4th will be a key catalyst to watch for any shifts in sentiment or guidance.

headlines.title: Taiwan Seeks to Detain Three in Nvidia Smuggling Crackdown
Mizuho Maintains a Neutral Rating on Super Micro Computer, Inc. (SMCI)

examples.body: $NVDA $TSM $SMCI $NBIS $MU BREAKING NEWS --- (BENZINGA & CNBC -2ND UPDATE) 'NVIDIA TO LAUNCH SINGAPORE RESEARCH HUB AS CITY-STATE BOOST AI PLANS' -…
$SMCI Absolute garbage, can't even hold gains when it's still red and everything else is green.
$SMCI Can we get back to even in power hour? Obviously not, but I just smoked a little hopium.
$SMCI $NBIS Sheesh I picked the wrong one and continue to…
$SMCI Actually holding up better thann Muncher expected
